_comment: Fixture stem -> the HTTP method, path, and Content-Type a real idempotent request of this shape carries. These are REQUEST payloads (POST bodies), not webhook deliveries: the Idempotency-Key travels in the request header the client sends, and the endpoint keys its store on (METHOD, PATH, Idempotency-Key). charge_basic is the primary payload; charge_mismatch is a DIFFERENT body on the SAME endpoint used to test the same-key-different-body conflict; order_create targets a second endpoint to demonstrate per-endpoint key scoping. Bodies are docs-derived (Stripe's charge/idempotency docs shapes), never wire-captured — see PROVENANCE.md.

charge_mismatch.note: DIFFERENT body, same endpoint — the same-key mismatch conflict case

order_create.note: second endpoint — demonstrates per-endpoint key scoping
